creator: wenheping@gmail.com
text:
Py-cclib is an open source library, written
in Python, for parsing and interpreting the
results of computational chemistry packages.
The current version, cclib 0.9, parses output
files from ADF, GAMESS (US), GAMESS-UK, Gaussian,
Jaguar, Molpro, ORCA and PC GAMESS.

WWW:  http://cclib.sourceforge.net/

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
